localization.name: Fiery Hellball
localization.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 800% total damage). This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The user and target are both granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

Stuns for 50TU one other non-water, burning enemy per Charge stored on the user (max of 3 targets).

localization.name: Mass Dismissal
localization.description: Immediately defeats all conjured, non-boss units on both sides of the battlefield. Allies gain 2 Spirit and the enemy team loses 2 Spirit for each unit defeated in this way. The user is considered to have defeated with attacks as many units as are defeated this way (even if they were Ephemeral). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the targets from being defeated. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use.

localization.name: Devil's Anger
localization.description:
200% damage to 2 enemies, plus 200% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 800% damage). This attack ignores the Stealth status effect, and effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated. The user gains the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield or if all enemy units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills. A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn deals damage. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

localization.name: Deal with the Devil
localization.description:
Enrages 1 other ally, grants them the burn status effect, and immediately gives them the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with an attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.
localization.selected:
Enrages, burns, and grants turn to 1 other ally
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Ruler of the Wicked
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit enters battle with the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU.

If all units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills, this unit has a 50% bonus to attacks.

Whenever a Fire ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source:

- All allies become Enraged.
- All enemies are granted the Burn status effect and become Weakened. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn deals damage. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

localization.name: Demon Charges
localization.description:
This unit enters battle with 2 Charges. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever this unit defeats any number of units with an attack, this unit gains a Charge and this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

When this unit has:
- 2+ Charges stored, this unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
- 3 Charges stored, this unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.

Whenever a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit loses 1 Charge.

localization.name: Immovable
localization.description: This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

localization.name: Stun Immunity
localization.description: This unit is not affected by stun effects.

localization.name: Sleep Immunity
localization.description: This unit is not affected by sleep effects.
